actions.name: post_shift

department_id.description: Department ID. Required if the location uses departments.

role_id.description: Role ID. Required if the location uses roles.

start.description: Start date time of the shift. UTC in ISO8601 format.

end.description: End date time of the shift. UTC in ISO8601 format.

close.description: Set to true if the shift ends at closing time. If set, end is not used.

business_decline.description: Set to true if the shift ends at business decline.

draft.description: If true the shift is not published.

notified.description: If true the user has been notified of the published shift.

open.description: Set to true if the shift is not assigned to any user. Open shifts can be requested by users.

open_offer_type.description: Set when open is true. Set to 1 for everyone can request an open shift; set to 1 if only offered to specified role.

list_in_job_network.description: Set to true if the shift should be made available to the 7shifts job network.

job_network_wage.description: The wage to offer the shift at in the 7shifts job network.

unassigned_skill_level.description: The skill level required for this shift.

status.description: Shift status type. 0 - none, 1 - sick, 2 - no show, 3 - late, 4 - call out, 5 - left late.

late_minutes.description: Number of minutes a user can clock in late after the shift starts.

breaks.description: Breaks to be created with the shift

start.description: Start date time of the break. UTC in ISO8601 format.

actions.risk: Create Shift in the configured 7shifts account.

actions.name: post_time_punch

department_id.description: Department ID. Defaults to 0 if not defined. Required if location has departments setup.

user_id.description: The 7shifts ID of the user who is clocking in.

role_id.description: The ID of the role that the user is clocking in to work for. Defaults to 0 if not defined.

clocked_in.description: The start date and time when the user clocked in. Formatted as ISO8601 datetime in UTC timezone.

clocked_out.description: The start date and time when the user clocked out. Formatted as ISO8601 datetime in UTC timezone.

tips.description: Tips declared for the shift in cents

paid.description: Specifies whether the break is paid or unpaid. Default true when no existing setting is found.

in.description: The start date and time of the break. Formatted as ISO8601 datetime in UTC timezone.

out.description: The end date and time of the break. Formatted as ISO8601 datetime in UTC timezone.

custom_break_id.description: The custom break id belonging to the break if the break is a custom break.

actions.risk: Create Time Punch in the configured 7shifts account.

actions.name: post_user

location_ids.description: An array of location IDs this user will be assigned to

department_ids.description: An array of department IDs this user will be assigned to. Department ID is required if this user's location has at least one department

role_ids.description: An array of role IDs this user will be assigned to.

mobile_number.description: The user's mobile phone number. Format with no spaces and include area code

home_number.description: The user's home phone number. Format with no spaces and include area code

postal_zip.description: The user's postal code or zip code

invite_user.description: If true Invite the user to 7shifts

hire_date.description: The hire date of this user. Format YYYY-MM-DD

employee_id.description: Either an employee ID or an ID assigned by your payroll provider that is used in your payroll export

punch_id.description: The punch ID they punch in/out with. If no value is provided a new one will be created

language.description: The user's preferred language. Default value is en

appear_as_employee.description: User should appear in the system as an employee. Applies to admin users only

subscribe_to_updates.description: Subscribe this user to updates from 7shifts. This includes announcing new features for 7shifts

max_weekly_hours.description: The maximum weekly hours this user is set to work

wages.description: An array of Wages that will be set to the assigned User's roles

permissions_template_id.description: Id of a permissions template the user will be assigned to and granted permissions from.

actions.risk: Create User in the configured 7shifts account.

actions.name: put_time_punch

role_id.description: The ID of the role that the user is clocking in to work for.

clocked_in.description: The start date and time when the user clocked in. Formatted as ISO8601 datetime in UTC timezone.

clocked_out.description: The start date and time when the user clocked out. Formatted as ISO8601 datetime in UTC timezone.

tips.description: Tips declared for the shift in cents

breaks.description: List of breaks during a shift. Breaks must always be included in a correct state in update requests. The absence of an existing break in the payload implies that it should be deleted.

id.description: The break id belonging to the break if it previously existed before the update.

paid.description: Specifies whether the break is paid or unpaid. Default true when no existing setting is found.

in.description: The start date and time of the break. Formatted as ISO8601 datetime in UTC timezone.

out.description: The end date and time of the break. Formatted as ISO8601 datetime in UTC timezone.

custom_break_id.description: The custom break id belonging to the break if the break is a custom break.

actions.risk: Update Time Punch in the configured 7shifts account.

mobile_number.description: The user's mobile phone number. Format with no spaces and include area code

home_number.description: The user's home phone number. Format with no spaces and include area code

postal_zip.description: The user's postal code or zip code

hire_date.description: The hire date of this user. Format YYYY-MM-DD

employee_id.description: Either an employee ID or an ID assigned by your payroll provider that is used in your payroll export

punch_id.description: The punch ID they punch in/out with.

language.description: The user's preferred language. Default value is en

appear_as_employee.description: User should appear in the system as an employee. Applies to admin users only

subscribe_to_updates.description: Subscribe this user to updates from 7shifts. This includes announcing new features for 7shifts

max_weekly_hours.description: The maximum weekly hours this user is set to work

active.description: User status. If false the user is unable to login

permissions_template_id.description: Permission Template ID the user is assigned to

invite.description: If true, an invite will be sent to the user

wage_type.description: Whether the user is paid hourly or weekly

show_copy_previous_dialog.description: This setting enables or disables the modal that appears when copying a schedule

push.description: If the user should receive mobile push notifications. Must have the 7shifts mobile app installed and logged in.

sms_notifications.description: If the user should receive SMS notifications

actions.name: update_shift

department_id.description: Department ID. Required if the location uses departments

role_id.description: Role ID. Required if the location uses roles

station_id.description: The station assigned to the shift

start.description: Start date time of the shift. UTC in ISO8601 format

end.description: End date time of the shift. UTC in ISO8601 format

close.description: Set to true if the shift ends at closing time. If set end is not used.

business_decline.description: Set to true if the shift ends at business decline.

draft.description: If true the shift is not published.

open.description: Set to true if the shift is not assigned to any user. Open shifts can be requested by users.

open_offer_type.description: Set when open is true. Set to 0 when everyone at a location can request an open shift; set to 1 if only offered to specified role.

unassigned.description: When true the shift is unassigned. Internal use only.

unassigned_skill_level.description:
The skill level required for this shift.
 * 1: Beginner
 * 2: Intermediate
 * 3: Experienced

status.description:
Shift status type.
 * -1: Custom (requires custom_flag_id)
 * 0: None
 * 1: Sick
 * 2: No Show
 * 3: Late
 * 4: Call Out
 * 5: Left Late

custom_flag_id.description: Custom shift flag ID. Required when status is -1. Must match a company custom shift flag.

late_minutes.description: Number of minutes a user can clock in late after the shift starts.

breaks.description: Breaks to be updated with the shift

start.description: Start date time of the break. UTC in ISO8601 format.

actions.risk: Update Shift in the configured 7shifts account.
